pages.text: Brew an awkward potion with Raw Frog Legs for a Potion of Hopping. While it is active, a jump throws you forward the way you are facing - a frog leap across the ground, where vanilla's Jump Boost only sends you straight up. It also shaves a few blocks off your fall, so leaping off a ledge does not hurt.

Glowstone upgrades it to Hopping II, which leaps further. Splash, lingering, and tipped-arrow versions come off the base potion as usual. Pair it with Slow Falling if you want to cover real distance off a big drop.
